summary:
The available information does not support a link between standard residency selection criteria and subsequent surgical performance. Instead, it highlights that skills developed through simulation-based training and individual traits such as conscientiousness play more significant roles than formal selection metrics. 

Note: This summary is based solely on content from Agent1’s response; external knowledge has been excluded per instructions.
